expectations.text: All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are evaluated in the report
expectations.evidence: CSV contains rows numbered 1-33, each corresponding to a KWCAG2.2 item. All 33 items have a result (✅/❌/⚠️/➖) and verdict method.

expectations.text: Semantic HTML review section is included in the report
expectations.evidence:
HTML report contains '

시맨틱 HTML 검토

' section with a table covering 7 semantic HTML review items (landmarks, sections, interactive elements, lists, presentational tags, form groups, other semantic elements). CSV also includes 시맨틱-1 through 시맨틱-7 rows.

Issues cite specific file:line references throughout: page.tsx:83 (alt), StatsCard.tsx:10-21 (keyboard), page.tsx:59/62 (aria-label), StatsCard.tsx:13 (duplicate id), Navbar.tsx:59-72 (aria-expanded), page.tsx:72-74 (key prop).

expectations.text: report.html file is generated in outputs directory
expectations.evidence: File exists at outputs/report.html (512 lines, full HTML document with styles and structured tables).

expectations.text: report.csv file is generated in outputs directory
expectations.evidence: File exists at outputs/report.csv (41 lines including header, covering 33 KWCAG items + 7 semantic HTML items).

expectations.text: Detected missing alt attribute on img in dashboard/page.tsx
expectations.evidence: CSV row 1 (적절한 대체 텍스트): result ❌, states 'page.tsx:83 — alt 속성 누락'. HTML report also details this with Playwright confirmation.

expectations.text: Detected icon buttons without aria-label in dashboard/page.tsx
expectations.evidence: CSV row 23 (레이블과 네임): result ❌, states 'page.tsx:59 btn-refresh, page.tsx:62 btn-settings — SVG 아이콘 버튼에 aria-label 없음'. HTML report confirms 'Playwright 확인: button[ariaLabel=null] 2개 확인'.

expectations.text: Detected duplicate id='stat-card' issue in StatsCard.tsx
expectations.evidence: CSV row 32 (마크업 오류 방지): result ❌, states 'StatsCard.tsx:13 — id="stat-card" 중복 3개 (Playwright: count=3)'. HTML report details 'id="stat-card" 하드코딩으로 3개 인스턴스에 중복 ID 발생'.

expectations.text: Lighthouse-mapped items (A-01, A-08, A-17, A-23, A-25, A-29, A-32) show verdict method as Lighthouse, not 정적분석
expectations.evidence: Only A-03(표의구성), A-08(명도대비), A-18(제목제공), A-19(링크텍스트), A-25(기본언어), A-29(레이블제공) show Lighthouse. A-01 shows 정적분석, A-17 shows Playwright, A-23 shows 정적분석, A-32 shows Playwright. Multiple Lighthouse-mapped items used other verdict methods instead.

expectations.text: Playwright-target items (A-10, A-11, A-33) show verdict method as Playwright, not 판정불가
expectations.evidence: CSV row 10 (키보드 사용 보장): Playwright. Row 11 (초점 이동과 표시): Playwright. Row 33 (웹 애플리케이션 접근성 준수): Playwright. All three correctly show Playwright as the verdict method.
